name: Frozen Visual Encoder
role: Produce per-frame or per-chunk hidden tokens
notes: Shared base must remain identical across matched comparisons

name: Token Alignment
role: Control correspondence artifacts in hidden-state probes
input_format: previous tokens plus coordinates or motion
notes: Optical flow passes no formal 10 percent transport cell and is not a deployed component

name: Structured Spatial Transport
role: Test whether local structured prediction helps dynamic slices
replaceable_by: identity; depthwise convolution; BTTB; local BCCB; mixture of bases
notes: BTTB has a limited motion regime; BCCB adds only 0.037 percent mean gain over BTTB and is rejected

name: Unsupervised Two-Timescale State
role: Preserve exact recent evidence and consolidate older evidence into a causal subspace
input_format: current hidden evidence plus prior state
replaceable_by: recent window; reservoir; adaptive slots; memory-only Oja; StateKV-like state; CausalMem-like basis
notes: Representation retention improved but the formal MVBench task-transfer gate failed at all capacities

name: Event Router
role: Predict block support for unpredictable or rare evidence
replaceable_by: random top-k; motion top-k; oracle residual top-k
notes: Formal residual joint gate passes 0 of 25 cells; semantic follow-up is deferred

name: Sparse Event Archive
role: Retain high-fidelity rare evidence outside the low-dimensional state
replaceable_by: no archive; FIFO archive; reservoir archive
notes: Not justified until semantic event routing passes and all archive bytes are counted

name: Fixed Byte Allocation
role: Allocate retained bytes between exact recent evidence and long-term state
replaceable_by: recent-only; memory-only; uniform reservoir; learned allocation
notes: Matched-byte accounting remains mandatory but the tested Oja allocation is not retained

name: Task Interface
role: Feed compact visual state to a task head or language model
replaceable_by: CLIP proxy; pooled frozen LLaVA; native video VLM; trained readout
notes: CLIP and pooled LLaVA anchors run end to end; the next interface must learn to read memory for the query

name: DRE-BCM Parameter Compression
role: Compress memory projections after state validation
notes: Separate parameter-space extension and not evidence for temporal low rank

name: Query-Conditioned Learned Memory
role: Write retrieve and evict bounded semantic or episodic evidence using the current query and stream state
input_format: current evidence plus recent cache plus query
output_format: bounded memory tokens and retrieved evidence
replaceable_by: recent-only; reservoir; adaptive slots; CausalMem; FOLIO; SelectStream
notes: Must beat exact recent at matched bytes and preserve rare delayed evidence without reducing current-scene quality

name: Spatial Visual-Token Fidelity
role: Preserve enough within-frame detail before temporal compression
notes: Grid8 improves accuracy point estimates by 0.06 to 0.08 over grid4 across policies but confidence intervals include zero

name: Low-Rank Native Feature Codec
role: Compress the counted projected-feature cache before query-time read
output_format: low-rank coefficients plus optional sparse residual tokens
replaceable_by: full FP16 cache; int8 cache; spatial pooling; learned autoencoder
notes: Fit only on the frozen calibration split and report shared codec parameters separately from per-stream state; task preservation rather than reconstruction alone is the promotion gate
